2313680.name: A Quest to Be The Best
2313680.description: "A Quest to Be the Best" is an auto battler where players create their own characters to compete against others all around the world. In this strategy-focused game, you'll select your character's stats, and gear. Battles are automated, relying on your strategic planning rather than real-time control. As you win fights, your character gains boons, allowing for skill and stat upgrades. The game features a competitive leaderboard and a loot system, rewarding you with powerful items for your victories. The ultimate aim is to climb the ranks, continually enhancing your character, striving to become the most formidable competitor in the game's universe. Each playthrough is unique, offering endless possibilities and high replay value. See if you can be the best.
2313680.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
